name: Quick Chocolate Banana Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil's food cake mix (18.25 oz, without pudding)
1 package Vanilla pudding & pie filling (3-1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2 In a large bowl, combine mashed bananas, cake mix, pudding mix, eggs, sour cream, oil, and 1/4 cup water. Beat with electric mixer on low speed until combined.
3 Increase speed to medium and beat for 2 minutes.
4 Mix in nuts by hand.
5 Pour batter into well-greased and floured 12-cup bundt or tube pan.
6 Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
7 Let cool in the pan for 10-15 minutes before removing from the pan to cool completely.
